items.headline: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $205 From $264
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $211.44, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Could Be 39% Undervalued On Earnings Date And Cost Saving Story
items.snippet: Against Albemarle's last close at $129.02, the most widely followed narrative places fair value at $212.74. Albemarle's share price is down 3.57% over the last day and 17% over 30 days, even though 1 year total shareholder return of 86.22% still points to strong earlier gains.

items.headline: Albemarle Corporation to Release Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on Wednesday, August 5, 2026
Earnings Preview: What To Expect From Albemarle's Report
items.snippet: ALB is expected to release its Q2 2026 earnings soon. Analysts expect EPS of $3.21, up significantly from $0.11 in the year-ago quarter. For fiscal 2026, analysts project EPS of $13.15, up significantly from a loss of $0.79 per share in fiscal 2025.

items.headline: Baird Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $178 From $224
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $211.44, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) closed the latest trading day at $88.50, indicating a -0.9% change from the previous session's end. Shares have seen an increase of 22.58% over the last month. The company is forecasted to report an EPS of -$0.03.
